mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM post_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT post_id FROM post_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId}
